rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in valid component type scopes with visible identifiers only
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions
generic_rules: Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions and declarations
Avoid package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies
Generate minimal repairs that preserve unrelated architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers without matching `with` clauses
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about missing packages or property sets
